mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource ( contributorId, title, description, copyright, categoryId, place, previewImage, mediaUrl, status, reviewedAt, createdAt, updatedAt, archivedAt, resourceTypeId ) VALUES ( #{contributorId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{copyright}, #{categoryId}, #{place}, #{previewImage}, #{mediaUrl}, #{status}, #{reviewedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{archivedAt}, #{resourceTypeId} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.contributorId, r.title, r.description, r.copyright, r.categoryId, r.resourceTypeId, r.place, r.previewImage, r.mediaUrl, r.status, r.reviewedAt, r.createdAt, r.updatedAt, r.archivedAt, rt.typeName AS resourceType, c.categoryTopic AS categoryName FROM resource r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.categoryId = c.categoryId LEFT JOIN resourceType rt ON r.resourceTypeId = rt.resourceTypeId WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.contributorId, r.title, r.description, r.copyright, r.categoryId, r.resourceTypeId, r.place, r.previewImage, r.mediaUrl, r.status, r.reviewedAt, r.createdAt, r.updatedAt, r.archivedAt, rt.typeName AS resourceType, c.categoryTopic AS categoryName FROM resource r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.categoryId = c.categoryId LEFT JOIN resourceType rt ON r.resourceTypeId = rt.resourceTypeId WHERE r.id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, copyright = #{copyright}, categoryId = #{categoryId}, place = #{place}, previewImage = #{previewImage}, mediaUrl = #{mediaUrl}, status = #{status}, reviewedAt = #{reviewedAt}, updatedAt = #{updatedAt}, archivedAt = #{archivedAt}, resourceTypeId = #{resourceTypeId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.contributorId, r.title, r.description, r.copyright, r.categoryId, r.resourceTypeId, r.place, r.previewImage, r.mediaUrl, r.status, r.reviewedAt, r.createdAt, r.updatedAt, r.archivedAt, rt.typeName AS resourceType, c.categoryTopic AS categoryName FROM resource r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.categoryId = c.categoryId LEFT JOIN resourceType rt ON r.resourceTypeId = rt.resourceTypeId WHERE r.status = 'Approved'
AND ( r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND r.resourceTypeId = #{resourceTypeId}
AND r.categoryId = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY r.title ASC, r.reviewedAt DESC, r.updatedAt DESC
ORDER BY r.reviewedAt DESC, r.updatedAt DESC
ORDER BY r.reviewedAt DESC, r.updatedAt DESC

SELECT r.id, r.contributorId, r.title, r.description, r.copyright, r.categoryId, r.resourceTypeId, r.place, r.previewImage, r.mediaUrl, r.status, r.reviewedAt, r.createdAt, r.updatedAt, r.archivedAt, rt.typeName AS resourceType, c.categoryTopic AS categoryName FROM resource r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.categoryId = c.categoryId LEFT JOIN resourceType rt ON r.resourceTypeId = rt.resourceTypeId WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.status = 'Approved'
